utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item appears to be fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) is clear; travel_dates (July 10–14, 2024) are specific; transportation includes type, airline, class, and cost (€200); accommodation includes property name, type, and cost (€450); activities include name and cost (€220); additional_services include dining details with restaurant name, cuisine type, and cost (€550); total_budget (€1420) is given as a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all 7 items are covered and fully specified.
